metadata.description: Project name used as a naming prefix
Azure AI Search SharePoint index name (empty to disable)
Allow public network access to Key Vault

Allow public network access to ACR (needed for GitHub-hosted runners in dev)
Anthropic API key for direct API access (stored in Key Vault, passed to surf-api container)
Anthropic model ID for chat agents
Anthropic Foundry base URL (empty to use direct Anthropic API)
Anthropic Foundry API key (stored in Key Vault, used when anthropicFoundryBaseUrl is set)
Entra ID client secret for OBO flow (stored in Key Vault)
Set true after initial deployment once anthropic-api-key exists in Key Vault
Set true after initial deployment once entra-client-secret exists in Key Vault
Whether the Container Apps Environment is internal (VNet-only)
CORS allowed origins for surf-api (JSON array string)
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Tags to apply to all resources

Allow public network access for queries (Disabled for staging/prod)
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
Customer ID (workspace ID) for Log Analytics
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the Azure OpenAI resource
Tags to apply to all resources
Whether to deploy the GPT-5.2 chat model (disabled — chat uses Anthropic)
GPT-5.2 model capacity (in thousands of tokens per minute)
Whether to deploy a text-embedding model
Resource ID of the Azure OpenAI account
Name of the Azure OpenAI account
Endpoint URL of the Azure OpenAI account
Principal ID of the managed identity
Name of the Azure AI Search service
Tags to apply to all resources
Resource ID of the Azure AI Search service
Name of the Azure AI Search service
Endpoint URL of the Azure AI Search service
Principal ID of the managed identity
Tags to apply to all resources

Anthropic API key (stored as a secret when provided)
Anthropic Foundry API key (stored as a secret when provided)
Entra ID client secret for OBO flow (stored as a secret when provided)
Resource ID of the Key Vault
Tags to apply to all resources

Tags to apply to all resources

Resource ID of the Storage account (empty to skip private endpoint)
Resource ID of the Virtual Network
Resource ID of the Container Apps subnet
Resource ID of the Private Endpoints subnet
Base name for container apps resources
Tags to apply to all resources
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
Resource ID of the Container Apps subnet
Allow public network access to ACR (needed for GitHub-hosted runners in dev)
Container image tag for surf-web (e.g. git SHA). Leave empty to use a placeholder image on first bootstrap.
Azure AI Search SharePoint index name (empty to disable)
Anthropic model ID for chat agents
Container image tag for surf-api (e.g. git SHA). Leave empty to use a placeholder image on first bootstrap.
Container image tag for surf-ingestion (e.g. git SHA). Leave empty to use a placeholder image on first bootstrap.
Whether the anthropic-api-key secret exists in Key Vault. Defaults to true — set false only on first bootstrap before the key is stored.
Whether the anthropic-foundry-api-key secret exists in Key Vault.
Anthropic Foundry base URL (empty to use direct Anthropic API)
Whether the entra-client-secret secret exists in Key Vault. Defaults to true — set false only on first bootstrap.
Enable authentication (should be true for staging/prod)
Whether the Container Apps Environment is internal (VNet-only, no public ingress)
CORS allowed origins for surf-api (JSON array string, e.g. '["http://localhost:3000"]')

configuration.secrets: [concat(if(and(not(empty(parameters('keyVaultName'))), parameters('anthropicApiKeyExists')), createArray(createObject('name', 'anthropic-api-key', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/anthropic-api-key', parameters('keyVaultUri')), 'identity', resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-{0}', parameters('baseName'))))), createArray()), if(and(not(empty(parameters('keyVaultName'))), parameters('anthropicFoundryApiKeyExists')), createArray(createObject('name', 'anthropic-foundry-api-key', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/anthropic-foundry-api-key', parameters('keyVaultUri')), 'identity', resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-{0}', parameters('baseName'))))), createArray()), if(and(not(empty(parameters('keyVaultName'))), parameters('entraClientSecretExists')), createArray(createObject('name', 'entra-client-secret', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/entra-client-secret', parameters('keyVaultUri')), 'identity', resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-{0}', parameters('baseName'))))), createArray()))]

containers.name: surf-api
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('openAiEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('aiSearchEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SEARCH_SHAREPOINT_INDEX', 'value', parameters('aiSearchSharepointIndex')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_URL', 'value', parameters('storageBlobEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_KEYVAULT_URL', 'value', parameters('keyVaultUri')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-{0}', parameters('baseName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'ANTHROPIC_MODEL_ID', 'value', parameters('anthropicModelId')), createObject('name', 'API_CORS_ORIGINS', 'value', parameters('apiCorsOrigins')), createObject('name', 'AUTH_ENABLED', 'value', string(parameters('authEnabled'))), createObject('name', 'ENTRA_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('entraTenantId')), createObject('name', 'ENTRA_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('entraClientId'))), concat(if(parameters('anthropicApiKeyExists'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'anthropic-api-key')), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('anthropicFoundryBaseUrl'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_BASE_URL', 'value', parameters('anthropicFoundryBaseUrl'))), createArray()), if(parameters('anthropicFoundryApiKeyExists'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'anthropic-foundry-api-key')), createArray()), if(parameters('entraClientSecretExists'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ENTRA_CLIENT_SECRET', 'secretRef', 'entra-client-secret')), createArray())))]

properties.description: Fires when the container app restarts within a 5-minute window.
Fires when the 5xx response rate exceeds 5% over a 5-minute window.
